title: phyllostegia heterodoxa
intro: Phyllostegia heterodoxa, also known as Kolea or Hawaiian Plume Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Phyllostegia heterodoxa have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
